text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
(Now, then. If I were to estimate this experiment's progress… 
20%, perhaps? It seems I need a catalyst to accelerate 
the process. The more reactive, the better, of course.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Why, hello, Fuji-kun! Just who I wanted to see! I do hope you'll 
give me your support in the basket dodgeball event. 
Pokke-kun's going to be my opponent, after all.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm your captain, so of course I'll be cheering you on… 
But don't be sly, Tachyon. You're up to something, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Perish the thought! Is it so hard to believe I simply want to 
hear your cheers? Yes, watch me to your heart's content. 
——And don't take your eyes off me.

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Now it's time for the basket dodgeball event! Like the classic 
ball-toss game, each team's thrower will try to land balls 
in the basket to earn points, but——

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
There's the added twist that the basket's attached to a member 
of the other team, who'll be constantly on the move! Which of 
our two teams will come out on top in this contest of speed!?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let's see, the white team won the obstacle race and the 
tug-of-war. My oh my, it seems if you drop the ball here, we'll 
be running away with the lead～

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Indeed, you cannot afford to lose, now can you, my good thrower Pokke-kun? Do you think you'll be able to catch me? Hmm?

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
You always love running your damn mouth, huh? 
Shut the hell up and let's start already!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: ORAORAORAORAORAORAORAORAORAOAAAAAA!! Take that, Tachyon!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! Pokke-kun! Need I remind you what event this is?! 
Your goal is to land the balls in the basket, not on me! 
Just where do you think you're aiming?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm sorry, I see the problem! 
Am I moving far too fast for your poor little eyes to keep up?

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
HA! Like hell you are!! 
——I'm gonna make you stop dead in your tracks, 
little miss science freak!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Did I not just tell you about your aim, my good former delinquent? Hmm, I see, I see——

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'll admit that you've earned the coveted title of the "strongest". 
But the throne of the "fastest" is still up for grabs—— 
So you won't mind if I take it, now will you?

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
Shut the hell up. You wanna be the fastest? 
Enough jokes. I'm sure as hell not letting you. 
You're not even getting close.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
Don't forget! 
I'm Jungle Pocket, and I'm the strongest!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
……Heh heh. 
Yes… I suppose you'd say that.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
(Of course you would. 
——You have no limits, after all.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You conquered the Japanese Derby, the stage of every 
Umamusume's dreams. You won the Japan Cup, tearing 
T.M. Opera O from her throne at the peak.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And yet, your animalistic greed refuses to be satisfied. Like an 
untameable beast… Like a child who simply wants without 
reservation… You continue to pursue the title of the "strongest".

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You would go so far as to bare your fangs at your beloved 
mentor. Even my cheapest instigation is enough to set you off.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You are limitless. 
Always, to the point of driving me mad——

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ……Yes, it drives me mad, how infinite your potential is.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: So I will consume you. Every one of you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I will bind you all into polymers, and raise your molecules to an 
excited state. I will load you all into my sample concentrator, 
to synthesize a solution allowing me to surpass even light itself!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Evolve to your heart's content for me, Pokke-kun. 
Clash with her at full force for me, Fuji-kun.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Tap-kun, and Digital-kun, too. Yes, every one of you in this little 
bottle garden we call Tracen Academy, so full of infinite 
possibilities… I will swallow you all whole——

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: And I will reach the unreachable beyond!! With my own two legs!!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: GRAAAAAAAAAAAAHH SHUT THE HELL UP!!! YOU'RE NOT GOING ANYWHERE, TACHYON!!!!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
W-what unbelievable acceleration! And just as unbelievable 
pursuit! Agnes Tachyon dashes away, but Jungle Pocket 
is right on her tail!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
They're like two beasts ripping their teeth into each other!! 
This is one! Heated! Battle!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
……53! ……54! …55!! 
The team with the most balls in the basket is… 
The white team!!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
It was close! So close! But the red team fell just one inch 
short! The white team takes the win at basket dodgeball!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
………AAAAAAGH! Dammit!! 
Now we're really behind on points…!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmmm……Aren't you in a pickle now, Pokke-kun! Oh yes, you're doomed～ So very doomed～

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
……Save it. We're gonna turn this thing around. 
Just watch us.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
I'm not givin' up. Doesn't matter where I am or what 
I'm doing, I'm gonna kick some ass…!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ……Hmm.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
AH! Welcome back Tachyon-shan……!1! 
Huge congratulations on your epic win!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Now right this way, right this way. I've prepared a 
extra-fluffy cushion and super-duper sweet honey lemonade 
just for you…!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Why, you're as prepared as ever, Digital-kun. I couldn't ask 
for a more useful roommate. I'll go ahead and make the most 
of your amenities, then. I am simply exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That beast is quite the handful when she gets riled up… 
Isn't she, Fuji-kun?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ……Haha. Yeah, she is.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I know, I really do. 
——I always have.
